violations.text: The room used for food storage/service is lacking a hand sink. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Easily accessible hand sink is to be provided. Per the PIC, plumber is to be called same day. PIC is to send pictures of changes of bathroom conversion located directly adjacent to the food area (proper removal of toilet and bathroom door) for direct access to the hand sink. Per the PIC, the bathroom currently is not used as a bathroom and will not be used as a bathroom until conversion is complete. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
